name: Basic Chicken Mix
recipeIngredient: 6 pounds skinless boneless Chicken breast tenders
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the chicken tenders with fresh parsley, celery, carrots, and onions.
2. Add dried basil, salt, and pepper to taste.
3. Continue cooking until the chicken is no longer pink.
4. Divide into 6 equal portions for individual dinners.
